name: wool_nav_icons
description: Three Wool Crush bottom-navigation icons in one family: SHOP, a cream woven yarn basket holding three bright yarn balls; PLAY, a plump turquoise yarn ball with a bold cream triangular play cutout on its face; SETTINGS, a chunky raspberry gear whose outer teeth look like knitted loops around a cream center.
prompt_extra: strict 3 by 1 sheet; same plush tactile rendering, dark self-colored outline and top lighting; each symbol is centered and immediately readable at 48px; no letters

variants.name: plush
variants.prompt_extra: more tactile wool loops and woven basket texture

variants.name: graphic
variants.prompt_extra: bolder cleaner silhouettes and minimal texture
